script.openingLine: Welcome back to Replay, where England meet Congo DR in a round-of-32 contest at Atlanta Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: England meet Congo DR in the round of 32 at Atlanta Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay begins with both teams level, and the knockout setting gives the opening whistle immediate weight.

moments.spokenLine: Brian CIPENGA has put Congo DR ahead, and the score is 0–1.
moments.explainer: Congo DR take the lead, leaving England to chase the match from behind.

moments.spokenLine: Jude BELLINGHAM is shown a card for England.
moments.explainer: England are now carrying a booking as the contest continues.

moments.spokenLine: Noah SADIKI is shown a card for Congo DR.
moments.explainer: Congo DR also have a player cautioned before the interval.

moments.spokenLine: England trail Congo DR 0–1 at half-time.
moments.explainer: The first half belongs to Congo DR on the scoreboard, with England needing a response after the break.

moments.spokenLine: Harry KANE restores parity for England: 1–1.
moments.explainer: England draw level, turning a one-goal deficit into an entirely open contest.
England complete the turnaround and move in front late in the match.
The final score confirms England's comeback from 0–1 down to a 2–1 victory.

chapters.text: At kick-off, England meet Congo DR in the round of 32 at Atlanta Stadium.
In the 7th minute, Brian CIPENGA has put Congo DR ahead, and the score is 0–1.
In the 19th minute, Jude BELLINGHAM is shown a card for England.
In the 27th minute, Noah SADIKI is shown a card for Congo DR.
At half-time, England trail Congo DR 0–1.
In the 75th minute, Harry KANE restores parity for England: 1–1.
In the 86th minute, Harry KANE puts England ahead, 2–1.
At full-time, England defeat Congo DR 2–1.
